title: Next-Generation Agentic Reinforcement Learning Systems Enable Self-Evolving Agents
abstract: A microservice-based redesign of AReaL that decouples training, inference, agent execution and weight-update into independent services — enabling long-horizon, self-evolving agents at scale.

title: Post-training Multi-turn Interactive Tool-using Agents with Verifiable Rewards
abstract: AReaL-SEA, a self-evolving data-synthesis engine paired with RL training. A 235B MoE surpasses GPT-5 and matches Gemini 3.0 Pro on τ²-bench.

title: AReaL-DTA: Dynamic Tree Attention for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Large Language Models
abstract: A DFS-based dynamic tree attention that exploits shared rollout prefixes during RL post-training — up to 8.31× throughput over dense training on τ²-bench, with a load-balanced distributed batching scheme across GPUs.

title: AReaL: A Large-Scale Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning System for Language Reasoning
abstract: The original AReaL system paper — a fully asynchronous training paradigm that achieves 2.77× speedup while matching or exceeding synchronous baselines on reasoning benchmarks.
